description: A post-production media studio is upgrading its rendering farm. Your task is to assign software licenses to specific physical hardware nodes (node-locked), not to users. Create a new license named 'DaVinci Resolve Studio - Node Locked' for manufacturer 'Blackmagic Design' with 3 seats and a purchase cost of $295.00. Assign these seats to the assets 'RENDER-NODE-01', 'RENDER-NODE-02', and 'RENDER-NODE-03', ensuring they are checked out to the assets themselves. For the 'Maxon Redshift' license, check in the seat currently assigned to 'RENDER-NODE-04' and reassign it to 'RENDER-NODE-01'. Finally, retire the 'RENDER-NODE-04' asset by updating its status to 'Retired'.
